text.title: Debt Scoring Rubric Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the debt-register artefact (per-item score + aggregate). The register is the contract for sprint planning.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "dsr-q2-2026", "anchors_signed_off_by": "pm@acme.com", "anchors_signed_off_at": "2026-05-20", "items": [ {"item_id": "debt-order-mono", "title": "Monolithic order service hard to test", "category": "architecture", "factors": {"user_impact":4, "change_frequency":5, "fragility":4, "blast_radius":3, "fix_cost":3}, "score": 80.0, "confidence": "medium", "evidence": {"change_freq_source": "git log --since=90d src/order/", "fragility_source": "Linear: 12 bugs in 90d", "blast_source": "service map: order touches 5 downstream services"}, "what_changes_if_paid": "Reduce order-service bug rate by ~50%; enable per-domain CD."} ], "threshold": 30, "verdict": "publish-register", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }
example.note: items[0] minimum so the schema is shown; in practice MUST have ≥5 items.

artefact_id missing dsr- prefix; anchors_signed_off_by missing (run-the-checklist violation); category not in enum; user_impact=9 above max 5; confidence not in enum; threshold negative; only 1 item (<5); evidence + what_changes_if_paid missing; version + last_reviewed malformed.

antipattern.description: score does not match (user_impact * change_frequency * fragility * blast_radius) / fix_cost.
antipattern.reason: Formula mismatch; the score is no longer defensible.
Unsourced scoring becomes opinion; stakeholders reject.
Without stakeholder calibration, "User-Impact 5" means different things to different reviewers.
